description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a clean, geometric design. The front facade features a covered carport on the left, a main entryway with a small porch, and a landscaped area with a tree and flowerbeds. Large windows and sliding glass doors are present on both levels, providing ample natural light and a sense of openness. The rear and side elevations are more minimal, with fewer windows and a focus on privacy. The roof includes a central open courtyard or skylight area, visible from above. The exterior is finished in light gray and white tones, with some wooden accents and lush greenery enhancing the curb appeal.
description: A modern, flat-roofed two-story house with large windows, a carport, landscaped front yard, and a central rooftop courtyard.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main entrance, carport, landscaped yard with a tree, and large windows.
description_view_1: Left side view reveals the open carport, side garden, and minimal window openings.
description_view_2: Rear view highlights a large wooden accent panel, a balcony, and the central rooftop courtyard.
description_view_3: Right side view displays a side garden, minimal windows, and the continuation of the flat roof.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows and sliding glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a small porch, single door, covered carport, and landscaped approach
